name: aether-game-utils (ubuntu_clang)
initializeCommand: bash -lc 'u=unset; t=unset; [ -n "${localEnv:GHCR_USER}" ] && u=set; [ -n "${localEnv:GHCR_TOKEN}" ] && t=set; echo "GHCR credential status: GHCR_USER=${u}, GHCR_TOKEN=${t}."; if [ "${u}" = set ] && [ "${t}" = set ]; then if echo "${localEnv:GHCR_TOKEN}" | docker login ghcr.io -u "${localEnv:GHCR_USER}" --password-stdin; then echo "GHCR login succeeded."; else echo "Warning: GHCR login failed (credentials are set but were rejected); continuing without registry auth."; fi; else echo "GHCR login skipped (missing GHCR_USER and/or GHCR_TOKEN); continuing without registry auth."; fi'
